recommendations.title: Lizzie
recommendations.overview: Massachusetts, 1892. An unmarried woman of 32 and a social outcast, Lizzie lives a claustrophobic life under her father's cold and domineering control. When Bridget Sullivan, a young maid, comes to work for the family, Lizzie finds a sympathetic, kin

recommendations.title: Just Cause
recommendations.overview: A Harvard professor is lured back into the courtroom after twenty-five years to take the case of a young black man condemned to death for the horrific murder of a child.

recommendations.title: Dear Frankie
recommendations.overview: Nine-year-old Frankie and his single mum Lizzie have been on the move ever since Frankie can remember, most recently arriving in a seaside Scottish town. Wanting to protect her deaf son from the truth that they've run away from his father, Lizzie has

recommendations.title: Witness for the Prosecution
recommendations.overview: An ailing barrister is thrust back into the courtroom in what becomes one of the most unusual and eventful murder cases of the lawyer's career when he finds himself defending a man being tried for the murder of a socialite.

recommendations.title: The Lizzie McGuire Movie
recommendations.overview: Lizzie McGuire has graduated from middle school and takes a trip to Rome, Italy with her class. And what was supposed to be only a normal trip, becomes a teenager's dream come true.

recommendations.title: Happiest Season
recommendations.overview: A young woman's plans to propose to her girlfriend while at her family's annual holiday party are upended when she discovers her partner hasn't yet come out to her conservative parents.

recommendations.title: Monolith
recommendations.overview: A desperate young journalist turns to podcasting to salvage her career, but her rush to make headlines leads her to an alien conspiracy.

recommendations.title: The Intervention
recommendations.overview: A weekend getaway for four couples takes a sharp turn when one of the couples discovers the entire trip was orchestrated to host an intervention on their marriage.

recommendations.title: The Challenge
recommendations.overview: Estranged twins Lizzie and Shane are chosen for a Survivor-like popular game show with college scholarships as the prize.

recommendations.title: Talvar
recommendations.overview: A hardened cop deals with three conflicting perspectives involving a brutal double murder. The case is complicated as the prime suspects are the parents who supposedly killed their teenage daughter.
